title: Niche Zero Grinder
description: Single-dose, zero retention flat burr grinder. The gold standard for home espresso.

title: La Marzocco Linea Mini
description: Dual boiler, commercial-grade internals in a compact home machine.

title: Acaia Lunar Scale
description: Precision espresso scale with flow-rate timer and Bluetooth connectivity.

title: Onyx Tropical Weather
description: Ethiopian natural process. Blueberry, jasmine, honey. Perfect for light roast lovers.

title: Counter Culture Hologram
description: Versatile medium roast blend. Chocolate, caramel, citrus. Great all-rounder.

title: La Colombe Lyon Whole Bean Coffee
description: Nutty-sweet notes with a smooth, toasty flavor. Easy-drinking medium roast, 12 oz bag.

title: DWTS Espresso Shot Cups (Set of 2)
description: 4oz borosilicate glass cups with dual pour spouts and handles. Dishwasher safe, perfect for pulling shots.

title: Barista Journal Sticker Pack
description: Espresso-themed vinyl stickers for your portafilter, laptop, or water bottle.
